technologies.name: Digital X-Rays
technologies.description: Advanced digital imaging provides clearer, more detailed images with minimal radiation exposure. Images are available instantly on screen.

technologies.name: 3D Cone Beam CT Scanner
technologies.benefit: Complete 3D view of teeth, jaw, and nerves
technologies.description: Captures a full three-dimensional image of your dental structures in a single scan, enabling precise diagnosis and treatment planning for implants, extractions, and orthodontics.

technologies.name: CEREC Same-Day Crowns
technologies.benefit: Custom porcelain crowns in a single visit
technologies.description: CAD/CAM technology designs and mills a perfectly fitted ceramic crown right in the office, eliminating the need for temporary crowns and multiple appointments.

technologies.name: Intraoral Camera
technologies.benefit: See what the dentist sees in real time
technologies.description: A small, pen-sized camera captures high-resolution images inside your mouth, allowing you to view and understand your dental health alongside your provider.

technologies.name: Dental Laser (Diode)
technologies.description: Soft tissue laser enables precise, comfortable gum treatments with less bleeding, reduced swelling, and faster healing compared to traditional methods.

technologies.name: Digital Impressions (iTero)
technologies.description: The iTero scanner captures a highly accurate 3D digital impression of your teeth in minutes, improving comfort and precision for crowns, aligners, and other restorations.

technologies.name: LED Curing Lights
technologies.description: High-intensity LED lights cure tooth-colored fillings in seconds, creating a stronger bond and more durable restoration with reduced chair time.

technologies.name: Panoramic X-Ray
technologies.benefit: Full mouth view in a single image
technologies.description: Captures a complete view of your entire mouth, jaw joints, and sinuses in one sweeping image, essential for comprehensive treatment planning and detecting hidden issues.
